# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-29

Wayfinder Router is an open-source tool that deterministically routes queries between local and hosted LLMs.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Wayfinder Router: deterministic routing of queries between local and hosted LLM
   Cost/latency leverage for local+hosted LLM agent stacks.

2. pg_plan_advice — help the planner get the right plan
   PostgreSQL's pg_plan_advice (in the PG19 docs) lets you nudge the planner toward a chosen plan without hint hacks. Useful if you've hit plan-regression...

3. WAL-RUS: a Rust Rewrite of WAL-G for PostgreSQL Backups
   Practical Postgres backup tooling for self-hosters.

4. Turn your site into a place people can bump into each other
   TownSquare is a tiny embeddable 'presence layer' that lets website visitors see and bump into each other in real time. A low-lift way to add live presence...
